contractNotice: This app is a non-production Expo placeholder. It mirrors the Path A screen map with static/mock data only and does not call backend, payment, provider, operator, or admin endpoints.
guardrails: No real authentication flow, embedded credentials, bearer tokens, persisted sessions, or backend-auth bypass.
No production API base URL or production customer data.
No persisted customer, payment, order, or provider data.
No checkout submission against live backend state.
No payment provider SDK, provider payment session, card collection, or raw provider payload handling.
No direct mobile calls to payment webhook, provider, operator, or admin endpoints.
No static legal copy presented as production cancellation/refund policy.
No real-time payment confirmation claims without a documented customer payment-status refresh contract.
backendGaps: Customer sign-in/token acquisition flow beyond GET /auth/me.
Provider-specific payment initialization response for real payment handoff.
Customer payment-status polling or order/payment result reconciliation path.

screens.title: Authentication Entry
screens.purpose: Orient the customer into public browse mode or mock authenticated navigation without implementing sign-in.
screens.mockState: Mock auth state only. No token, credential, persisted session, or backend-auth bypass exists in this placeholder.
keyActions: Show protected-path affordances as mock authenticated navigation only.

dependencies.name: GET /api/v1/auth/me
dependencies.note: Authenticated context lookup exists for protected backend flows.

dependencies.name: Customer token acquisition/sign-in endpoint
dependencies.note: The placeholder does not embed credentials, tokens, sessions, or backend-auth bypasses.

screens.title: Catalog Home And Category Browse
screens.purpose: Represent public category browsing as the read-only entry point into products and kits.
screens.mockState: Static categories only. No customer write or provider filter is available.
keyActions: Move to product or kit browsing.

dependencies.name: GET /api/v1/catalog/categories
dependencies.note: Public category collection.

dependencies.name: Public catalog eligibility rules
dependencies.note: Eligibility remains backend-derived and output-only.

screens.title: Product List
screens.purpose: Show active products with backend-derived direct-checkout signals and documented list controls.
screens.mockState: Static products demonstrate eligibility states without making price, provider, or availability claims from the client.

dependencies.name: GET /api/v1/catalog/products
dependencies.note: Supports category_id, page, and page_size only.

dependencies.name: Product eligibility fields
dependencies.note: Uses backend-owned availability_state, direct_checkout_eligible, eligibility_reason, and lead-time fields.

dependencies.name: Client-side provider or price filters
dependencies.note: The public contract rejects arbitrary provider, price, lead-time, eligibility, and sorting controls.

screens.title: Product Detail
screens.purpose: Show customer-safe product information and purchasability without trusting client-owned eligibility.
screens.mockState: Static detail content. Pricing and checkout actions stay mock-only.
keyActions: Move to supported customization or pricing preview.

dependencies.name: GET /api/v1/catalog/products/{product_id}
dependencies.note: Public product detail for active products.

dependencies.name: Product direct-checkout eligibility
dependencies.note: Backend-owned and output-only.

screens.title: Kit List
screens.purpose: Show visible kits with customer-safe active product summaries and kit-level eligibility.
screens.mockState: Static kits demonstrate visible but not directly purchasable states without hiding active unavailable contents.

dependencies.name: GET /api/v1/catalog/kits
dependencies.note: Returns visible active kits and customer-safe product summaries.

dependencies.name: Kit visibility and eligibility contract
dependencies.note: Kits with zero active required contents are hidden; active unavailable contents remain listed and make the kit not directly purchasable.

screens.title: Kit Detail
screens.purpose: Represent customer-safe inspection of one visible Kit before pricing.
screens.mockState: Static detail mirrors the implemented public KitRead contract; the placeholder still makes no backend calls.

dependencies.name: GET /api/v1/catalog/kits/{kit_id}
dependencies.note: Returns one visible Kit with the same active-content projection and backend-derived eligibility as the Kit list.

dependencies.name: Kit pricing interaction
dependencies.note: Fixed-content Kit previews use backend KitItem quantities and Product base prices.

screens.title: Template Selection And Rules-Based Design Input
screens.purpose: Represent backend-defined TemplateField customization without AI, AR, 3D, file review, or design generation.
screens.mockState: Static fields only. No Design record is created by this placeholder.
keyActions: Browse or select a template placeholder.
Show that valid Design persistence is pending.

dependencies.name: GET /api/v1/templates
dependencies.note: Returns public active Template summaries in deterministic order.

dependencies.name: GET /api/v1/templates/{template_id}
dependencies.note: Returns public active Template detail with active backend-owned fields.

dependencies.name: POST /api/v1/designs
dependencies.note: Creates an authenticated customer-owned Design only after backend validation.

dependencies.name: GET /api/v1/designs/{design_id}
dependencies.note: Returns one persisted Design only to its authenticated owner.

dependencies.name: AI/AR/3D/file-based design generation
dependencies.note: Out of MVP scope.

screens.title: Pricing Preview
screens.purpose: Show backend-calculated pricing as the only authoritative price source.
screens.mockState: Static quote sample. The app does not compute or submit totals.
keyActions: Submit supported Product, fixed-content Kit, or owned persisted Design pricing inputs in future wiring.
Block checkout for unavailable, manual-quote-only, or non-priceable states.

dependencies.name: POST /api/v1/pricing/quotes
dependencies.note: Public Product/Kit and authenticated owner-scoped Design pricing preview endpoint.

dependencies.name: Product pricing preview
dependencies.note: Current product preview uses backend base price and quantity.

dependencies.name: Kit pricing preview
dependencies.note: Temporary fixed-content rule uses backend KitItems, Product base prices, and effective quantities.

dependencies.name: Design pricing preview
dependencies.note: Persisted owner-scoped Designs revalidate backend customization and use the Template's related Product base price.

dependencies.name: Frontend-supplied totals/provider cost
dependencies.note: Must be ignored or rejected; never authoritative.

screens.title: Checkout Review
screens.purpose: Reserve a review step for backend-derived checkout state and cancellation/refund terms before payment.
screens.mockState: No live order creation. Sample terms copy must remain visibly non-production.
keyActions: Confirm checkout only in mock navigation.
Show draft order creation as an implemented backend dependency.

dependencies.name: POST /api/v1/orders
dependencies.note: Authenticated draft order creation from backend-validated checkout state.

dependencies.name: Customer-visible terms content surface
dependencies.note: Placeholder terms must not be presented as production legal policy.

dependencies.name: Frontend ownership, price, or provider claims
dependencies.note: Checkout derives owner from auth and totals from backend.

screens.title: Payment Initiation
screens.purpose: Represent backend-owned payment attempt initialization without card handling or provider secrets.
screens.mockState: No payment provider SDK, payment session, card collection, or live backend call.
keyActions: Show initiated or retry-safe active attempt state.
Keep order unconfirmed until backend verification.

dependencies.name: POST /api/v1/payments
dependencies.note: Accepts only order_id and returns provider-neutral payment data.

dependencies.name: Provider-specific payment session/client secret
dependencies.note: Future issue required when real provider contract is documented.

dependencies.name: Card data collection/storage in PlacamIA backend
dependencies.note: Backend must not store card data.

screens.title: Payment Result States
screens.purpose: Show payment lifecycle labels without trusting frontend return pages as confirmation.
screens.mockState: Static states only. No real-time payment confirmation is implied.
keyActions: Show initiated, pending, requires_action, verified, failed, cancelled, and expired states.
Route to order tracking only as a placeholder.

dependencies.name: POST /api/v1/payments/webhook
dependencies.note: Backend/provider boundary only; not called by the mobile app.

dependencies.name: Customer payment-status polling endpoint
dependencies.note: No customer refresh endpoint exists yet; placeholder states are static/mock.

dependencies.name: Frontend payment success claim
dependencies.note: Never marks payment verified or order confirmed.

screens.title: Order List
screens.purpose: Represent authenticated customer-owned Order summary browsing before tracking.
screens.mockState: Static summaries mirror the implemented owner-scoped list contract; the placeholder still makes no backend calls.

dependencies.name: GET /api/v1/orders
dependencies.note: Returns authenticated owner-scoped summaries with deterministic pagination and persisted totals.

dependencies.name: Cross-user order visibility
dependencies.note: Backend list and count queries enforce ownership; mobile must not client-filter ownership.

screens.title: Order Detail And Tracking
screens.purpose: Represent customer-safe persisted purchase detail, canonical lifecycle states, and cancellation request boundaries.
screens.mockState: Static detail mirrors the implemented owner-scoped snapshot contract; provider/admin status mutations are not customer actions.
keyActions: Show cancellation request only for allowed paid states.

dependencies.name: GET /api/v1/orders/{order_id}/status
dependencies.note: Authenticated owner status retrieval.

dependencies.name: POST /api/v1/orders/{order_id}/cancellation-request
dependencies.note: Owning customer can request cancellation from confirmed, accepted, or in_production.

dependencies.name: GET /api/v1/orders/{order_id}
dependencies.note: Returns one owner-scoped Order with customer-safe persisted OrderItem snapshots.

dependencies.name: Admin/provider mutation endpoints
dependencies.note: Not mobile-facing customer UI actions.
